name: Thompson Creek Metals Company Inc.
description: Thompson Creek Metals Company Inc. was a North American mining company focused on the acquisition, exploration, development, and operation of mining properties. The company primarily produced copper, gold, and molybdenum. Headquartered in Denver, Colorado, with a significant corporate presence in Toronto, Ontario, it operated as a full-cycle mining entity. Thompson Creek Metals was publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol TCM before being acquired by Centerra Gold in 2016, marking the end of its independent operations in the global mining sector.
